mapper.select:
SELECT account_id, user_id, phone, password_hash, password_updated_at, last_login_at, create_time, update_time FROM auth_account WHERE user_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_account(user_id, phone, password_hash, password_updated_at, last_login_at, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{passwordUpdatedAt}, #{lastLoginAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_updated_at = #{passwordUpdatedAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE auth_account SET last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
